summary: Tested PIN styling improvements and unique PIN enforcement. All 6 backend tests and 8 frontend tests passed (100% success rate). PIN inputs now show visible digits (type=text), have square block styling (w-16 h-16 / w-20 h-20 with rounded-2xl), and keypad buttons are larger (h-16) with white background. Backend correctly rejects duplicate PINs with error 'Deze PIN code is al in gebruik door een ander bedrijf'.

test_results.pin_input_type_text: PASS - All 4 PIN inputs have type='text' for visible digits
test_results.pin_input_square_blocks: PASS - PIN inputs have w-16 h-16 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 square dimensions
test_results.pin_input_rounded_2xl: PASS - PIN inputs have rounded-2xl styling
test_results.keypad_buttons_h16: PASS - Keypad buttons have h-16 height
test_results.keypad_buttons_white_bg: PASS - Keypad buttons have bg-white background
test_results.pin_digits_visible: PASS - Entered PIN digits are visible (not dots)
test_results.invalid_pin_error_red: PASS - Invalid PIN shows error with red-highlighted blocks
test_results.valid_pin_login_redirect: PASS - Valid PIN (1234) redirects to kiosk page
test_results.duplicate_pin_rejected: PASS - Backend rejects duplicate PIN with 400 error
test_results.same_company_can_keep_pin: PASS - Company can update settings without PIN conflict
test_results.password_login_works: PASS - Password login still works correctly

features_tested: PIN input fields show visible digits (type=text, not password)
PIN input fields are square blocks (w-16 h-16 / w-20 h-20) with rounded-2xl styling
PIN keypad buttons are larger (h-16) with clear text and white background
Valid PIN login (1234) works and redirects to kiosk
Invalid PIN shows error in red-highlighted blocks
Backend rejects duplicate PIN with error 'Deze PIN code is al in gebruik door een ander bedrijf'
Backend allows same company to keep their own PIN (update without change)
critical_code_review_comments: CompanySelect.jsx PIN inputs correctly use type='text' (line 408) for visible digits
PIN input styling correctly uses w-16 h-16 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 rounded-2xl (line 414)
Keypad buttons correctly use h-16 bg-white (lines 438-442)
Backend kiosk.py correctly checks for unique PIN before saving (lines 240-247)
Error message is in Dutch as expected: 'Deze PIN code is al in gebruik door een ander bedrijf'
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN styling improvements verified: 1) PIN inputs use type='text' for visible digits, 2) Square block styling with w-16 h-16 / w-20 h-20 and rounded-2xl, 3) Keypad buttons h-16 with white background. Unique PIN enforcement working: backend rejects duplicate PINs with 400 error. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
